basic.heroSubtitle: Send photos to your loved ones' frames instantly. They'll see your face every day, feeling your presence even when you're apart.
basic.designedFeatureDescription: Every feature crafted to bridge the distance between generations.
basic.designedFeature1Description: Send "I am thinking of you" in one tap. Your family sees it on their frame instantly.
basic.designedFeature2Description: Relive special moments. Photos from the same day in previous years appear as delightful surprises.
basic.designedFeature3Description: Birthdays and holidays automatically remembered. Family stays connected.
basic.designedFeature4Description: Elderly family members can receive photos by simply scanning a QR code.
basic.designedFeature5Description: E-ink display only uses power when changing. Set it and forget it.
basic.designedFeature6Description: Your photos stay private. Self-hosted AI, no cloud dependency.
basic.featureTitle: For the moments that deserve to stay visible
basic.featureDescription: MyFrame is for parents, couples, and families who want photos to become part of daily life, not disappear into a phone gallery.
basic.productDescription: The latest E-ink technology delivers 65,000 colors with a paper-like finish. No glare, no backlight — just natural, beautiful images that look like prints.
basic.pricingDescription: One price. No subscriptions. No hidden fees.
basic.familyDescription: Share moments through a mobile app experience that feels natural for families and comforting for the people who matter most.
basic.familyStep1Description: That's it. The frame connects to Wi‑Fi automatically.
basic.familyStep2Description: Send a QR code or invite link via WeChat, SMS, or email.
basic.familyStep3Description: Photos appear on the frame within seconds.
basic.specsDescription: From compact to large format—pick the MyFrame that fits your space.
basic.specsAsideBody: MyFrame is designed first as a home object: low power, low glare, and quiet enough to live with for years.
basic.specsNote1Body: Easy on the eyes with a natural, print-like look.
basic.specsNote2Body: Moments arrive without asking family to learn a complicated new experience.
basic.specsNote3Body: Compact options for desks and a larger format for shared spaces.

footer.footerText: A device where family can "appear" anytime. Built with love for the ones who matter most.

maintenance.text: We are improving the MyFrame website. Please check back soon.

zh.heroSubtitle: 将照片即时发送到亲人的相框，让陪伴每天都被看见。
zh.heroImageCaption: 您的照片将显示在这里
zh.productDescription: 新一代电子墨水技术可呈现 65,000 种色彩，拥有纸张般的观感。无眩光、无背光，只留下自然细腻的画面。
zh.featureTitle: 让值得珍藏的时刻一直可见
zh.featureDescription: MyFrame 适合父母、伴侣和家庭，让照片融入日常生活，而不是消失在手机相册里。
zh.pricingDescription: 一次购买，无订阅，无隐藏费用。
zh.familyDescription: 通过微信、短信或邮件发送二维码或邀请链接，让远方的家人每天都能看见你的照片。
zh.footerText: 一款让家人随时“出现”的设备，为最重要的人而打造。
zh.notifyMeSuccess: 提交成功，我们会在产品开售时通知您。

zh.title: 给远方的父母
zh.description: 把当天的一张照片发送过去，让它成为家中安静可见的片刻。

zh.title: 给日常家庭生活
zh.description: 让小小的日常一直可见：孩子的笑脸，或一句来自同城的问候。

zh.title: 给婚礼和礼物
zh.description: 有意义的礼物能在特别的一天之后继续生长，变成家中的相册。

zh.title: 生日之后
zh.description: 让庆祝过后的细小瞬间也一直留在家中。

zh.title: 房间里的艺术展
zh.description: 把喜欢的作品和旅行照片，变成安静的家庭画廊角落。

zh.title: 给动物和宠物
zh.description: 让宠物照片留在比相册更温暖的地方。

download-app.title: Download the MyFrame app
download-app.body:
Install the official MyFrame app to pair frames, manage albums, and send photos securely.

  • Search MyFrame on the Apple App Store or Google Play.
  • Open the app and follow pairing steps shown on your frame.

Browse guides in the Documentation section or email support@myframetech.co for product questions.
download-app.excerpt: Get the companion app on your phone.

help-center.title: Help Center
help-center.body:
We aggregate quick answers across setup, pairing, uploads, shipping, and account questions.

Popular topics

  • Pairing a new frame via Bluetooth/NFC.
  • Supported image formats & display tips.
  • Returns and warranties — see Terms of Service.

Browse guides in the Documentation section or email support@myframetech.co for product questions.
help-center.excerpt: Find answers about setup, pairing, and shipping.

contact-us.title: Contact us
contact-us.body:
For order or device support, reach us at support@myframetech.co.

For business or press inquiries: partnerships@myframetech.co.
contact-us.excerpt: We're here for sales, product support, and press.

privacy-policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy-policy.body:
Last updated: This is a concise summary; final legal text belongs in counsel-reviewed documents.

What we collect

Account identifiers you provide when you shop or pair a device (email, billing details for orders), diagnostics our support team needs to troubleshoot, and imagery you voluntarily send through the app intended for frames you control.

How we use data

To fulfill orders, provide product features, comply with applicable law, and improve reliability and safety of our systems.

Choices & contact

For privacy requests applicable in your jurisdiction, contact support@myframetech.co.
privacy-policy.excerpt: How we collect, use, and protect personal data.

terms-of-service.title: Terms of Service
terms-of-service.body:
Note: Replace with jurisdiction-specific counsel-approved terms before production launch.

Use of hardware & software

Products are supplied as described on product pages at time of sale. Companion software may update for security and compatibility.

Orders

Prices, taxes, shipping, returns, and warranty limitations are communicated at checkout and in order confirmations.

Disclaimer

Services are offered on an as available basis; uninterrupted operation is not guaranteed.
terms-of-service.excerpt: Rules governing use of MyFrame hardware, apps, and the website.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.body:
Is there a subscription?

MyFrame emphasizes one-time purchases for hardware; companion app downloads are outlined on product listings.

Supported photos

See Documentation for sizing and color-profile guidance tuned for Spectra displays.

Shipping timelines

Shown at checkout; carriers may quote separate delivery windows.

Browse guides in the Documentation section or email support@myframetech.co for product questions.

about.title: About MyFrame
about.body:
MyFrame brings family imagery into the room with matte, paper-like surfaces made for sustained viewing—not endless scrolling feeds.

We obsess over display quality, private sharing, and long-term ownership without needless forced subscriptions.
about.excerpt: We build calm displays for memorable photos.

blog.title: Blog
blog.body: Long-form articles live on our Blog landing page alongside release notes.

press-kit.title: Press kit
press-kit.body:
For brand assets & product factsheets, email press@myframetech.co with your outlet and timeline.

High-resolution logo files can be zipped on request pending approval.

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.body:
Pairing & network

Open the companion app → follow on-screen NFC/Bluetooth cues to claim your frame.

Imagery workflow

Images are quantized for six-color Spectra pipelines; originals stay on your controlled devices unless you choose cloud backup features.

Need specifics? Reach support@myframetech.co.
documentation.excerpt: Specs, pairing guides, safe upload tips.

download-app.body: 在 App Store / Google Play 搜索 MyFrame ，按相框指引完成配对与发送照片。
download-app.excerpt: 在手机上安装配套应用

features.title: For parents far away
features.description: Send a photo from your day and let it become a quiet moment at home, where your parents can enjoy it without opening another app.

features.title: For daily family life
features.description: Keep small moments visible: a child's smile, an ordinary afternoon, a weekend walk, or a simple hello from across town.

features.title: For weddings and gifts
features.description: A meaningful gift can keep growing after the special day, becoming a living album for the home.

features.title: After birthday
features.description: Keep birthday moments visible after the celebration, with little memories that stay warm long after the candles are out.

features.title: An art show in the room
features.description: Use the display as a calm gallery corner for favorite artwork, travel photos, and the images that set the mood of a room.

features.title: For animals and pets
features.description: Let pet photos live somewhere warmer than the camera roll, from sleepy afternoons to the little chaos everyone loves.
